APPROVE
This is an investigation-kind bead with no formal acceptance criteria; the implicit deliverable is a documented root-cause analysis. The findings file confirms the bead's hypothesis (missing ca-certificates in the ubuntu:24.04-based overfull-hbox Dockerfile), provides reproducible evidence comparing failing vs. passing task images, proposes a minimal one-line Dockerfile fix, and files four scoped follow-ups. success
This is an investigation-kind bead with no formal acceptance criteria; the implicit deliverable is a documented root-cause analysis. The findings file confirms the bead's hypothesis (missing ca-certificates in the ubuntu:24.04-based overfull-hbox Dockerfile), provides reproducible evidence comparing failing vs. passing task images, proposes a minimal one-line Dockerfile fix, and files four scoped follow-ups. Evidence index cites specific log paths and the Dockerfile under investigation.
